scope: heavy public Work detail payload reduction
goals: Omit admin-only video fields from public Work detail JSON
Keep public rendering fields required by frontend playback
Avoid cache, target changes, pageSize changes, and DB roundtrip changes
changes: Changed public detail video mapping to PublicWorkVideoDto
Removed originalFileName, fileSize, and createdAt from PublicVideosJson writes/backfill
Registered PublicWorkVideoDto in source-generated JSON context
Updated backend and frontend contract tests

red_evidence.result: failed before implementation because public Work video JSON emitted an admin-only field

validations.result: public endpoint and WorkVideo endpoint tests passed 3/3; Postgres contract fixture blocked locally by missing docker
passed: Contract 1 skipped, Component 126, Unit 59, Architecture 35, Integration 214

local_blockers: docker command is unavailable in this WSL distro, blocking local Testcontainers/Postgres contracts and compose load smoke
k6 command is unavailable locally, blocking direct k6 smoke
expected_impact: Lower Work read response bytes for video-bearing Work details
Modestly lower JSON serialization allocation for video-bearing Work details
No expected change to DB command count because public Work detail remains one DB query
Smaller PublicVideosJson row payload for new writes and post-patch backfilled rows
not_changed: video playback or timeline preview behavior
recommendation: Push to dev and rely on CI for Docker/Postgres and compose gates; merge if green and verify main promotion/GHCR publish.
